---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Inscribe
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of what problem this feature would solve. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
What alternative solutions or workarounds have you considered?

## Impact
How would this feature benefit Inscribe users? Which module would it affect?

- [ ] Core
- [ ] Canvas
- [ ] Rendering
- [ ] Pencil
- [ ] Documents
- [ ] PDF
- [ ] Storage
- [ ] Sync
- [ ] Search
- [ ] UI
- [ ] AI
- [ ] Settings

## Additional Context
Add any mockups, references to other apps, or design inspiration here.
